case_title: RALPH SPENCER VS. SAN FRANCISCO AUTO RETURN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY SPENCER, RALPH AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO AUTO RETURN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-15-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-15-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPENCER, RALPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO AUTO RETURN $129.37 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $159.37 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
